description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The front facade features a single door on the left, a multi-pane window in the center, and an open porch area with a small set of steps leading up to it. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored horizontal wooden planks, and the cabin is elevated slightly above the ground on short supports. The rear and side walls are solid wood with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design. The overall appearance is rustic, with visible joinery details and a focus on natural materials.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, front porch, single door, and one large window on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the door, a large window, and an open porch with steps.
description_view_1: View of the porch and steps directly from the front, with the open porch area clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wooden wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Side view showing the plain wooden wall and the gable end of the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in reddish-brown asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: one large rectangular multi-pane window on the front facade, symmetrically placed between the door and porch
attribute_door_placement: one exterior door on the front facade, offset to the left side adjacent to the porch
